# Inner Success

> Inner Success is a distinct methodology — a programme for leaders that removes structural interference where capability itself is not the problem. It is not therapy, confidence work, mindset development, or leadership training. Nothing new is added. It removes the underlying condition that gets in the way of clear decision-making, effective responsibility, and unconflicted authority.

Inner Success was developed by Tara Halliday, the originator and lead practitioner. The programme is delivered one-to-one across eight modules by licensed practitioners. Results are measured before and after, and are practitioner-independent.

## Pages

- [The Programme](https://innersuccess.me/): Overview of Inner Success — the training parachute metaphor, how the programme works, and who it is for.
- [The Evidence](https://innersuccess.me/evidence.html): Measured before-and-after outcomes, practitioner-independence validation, the science (neuroregulation, memory reconsolidation, interpersonal dynamics), and testimonials.
- [For Organisations](https://innersuccess.me/organisations.html): Three deployment models — individual programme, scaled deployment with multiple licensed practitioners, and internal practitioner training. Includes deployment contexts and contact.
- [Research White Paper](https://innersuccess.me/white-paper.html): Full research paper — "Removing the Structural Drag on Leadership Performance: Evidence for a Root-Cause Intervention." Covers the problem, root cause (conditional worth), intervention design, outcome data, practitioner independence, and sustained change.

## Key Facts

- Programme for leaders (not a leadership programme)
- Removes structural interference — does not add skills, frameworks, or coping strategies
- Eight modules, delivered one-to-one, tailored to the individual
- Measured before and after using validated assessment
- Practitioner-independent: consistent results across 8+ trained practitioners
- Permanent change: follow-up data at 1 year and 5 years shows results hold
- Over 100 clients, 9+ years of delivery, 11 practitioners trained
- Contact: tara@innersuccess.me
